etymology.description: clipping of 鞠(鞠) (jū, "raise; bring up") -> earlier form with phonetic ⿰革勹 and semantic 米(米) (mǐ, "rice")
etymology.interpretation: The character 匊 is a clipped form derived from 鞠(鞠), using components associated with the idea of 'rice'. This suggests its original meaning involved rice, aligning with its definition of 'rice in a house'.
